productName: Smokiez Sleepy Watermelon Trifecta CBN:CBD:THC 2:2:1 Fruit Chews
description: These sweet, refreshing watermelon chews feel like a 100-year-old family candy recipe upgraded for the cannabis era: soft, bright, and irresistibly flavorful. It blends CBN to help you relax and ease into rest, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and THC for a classic euphoric lift in a 2:2:1 ratio. Perfect for winding down at the end of the day.
